head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland to Waikato, including Coromandel Peninsula
Cloudy periods. A few showers about Northland, extending elsewhere for a time tomorrow afternoon and evening.
Waitomo to Taranaki, also Bay of Plenty and the central high country
Partly cloudy with isolated showers, thunderstorms possible inland tomorrow afternoon and evening.
Gisborne to Wairarapa
Partly cloudy. Isolated showers, becoming widespread tomorrow with thunderstorms possible inland in the afternoon and evening.
Whanganui to Wellington
Isolated showers, turning to rain this evening, clearing tomorrow.
Nelson, Marlborough, Canterbury and Otago
Occasional rain or showers, clearing Canterbury and Otago tomorrow afternoon and elsewhere tomorrow evening.
Buller to Westland
Rain, with possible thunderstorms, easing to showers this evening, clearing from Grey and Westland tomorrow.
Fiordland and Southland
Partly cloudy. Isolated showers, clearing tomorrow.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods. Rain developing tonight, clearing tomorrow afternoon.
Saturday

North Island: Scattered rain developing about and north of the central high country with thunderstorms possible in the afternoon and evening. Showers for Gisborne and Hawke's Bay, clearing. Mainly fine elsewhere.
South Island: Mainly fine. A few showers developing in the west and south.
Sunday

North Island: Scattered showers from the central high country northwards, some heavy in the afternoon. A few evening showers in the south.
South Island: Rain in the east spreading north. Scattered showers in the west.
Monday

North Island: Partly cloudy. Occasional rain from Gisborne to Wellington, isolated showers elsewhere.
South Island: Partly cloudy in the east with showers. Fine in the west.
Chatham Islands

Mainly fine on Saturday. Isolated showers developing early Sunday, turning to rain later Sunday then easing to showers on Monday. Southerlies dying out on Saturday. Northwesterlies developing early Sunday, changing southwest later Sunday, becoming strong, cold southerly on Monday.
Issued: 1:12pm Thursday 26 Feb 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
